mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontTopicMapper.selectFrontTopicList */ SELECT TOPIC_SEQ /**/ , GROUP_SEQ /**/ , CATEGORY_SEQ /**/ , TITLE /**/ , STATUS /**/ , GOOGLE_EVENT_ID /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM TOPIC

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontTopicMapper.selectFrontTopicPage */ SELECT TOPIC_SEQ /**/ , GROUP_SEQ /**/ , CATEGORY_SEQ /**/ , TITLE /**/ , STATUS /**/ , GOOGLE_EVENT_ID /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM TOPIC

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontTopicMapper.selectFrontTopic */ SELECT TOPIC_SEQ /**/ , GROUP_SEQ /**/ , CATEGORY_SEQ /**/ , TITLE /**/ , STATUS /**/ , GOOGLE_EVENT_ID /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM TOPIC WHERE TOPIC_SEQ = #{topicSeq}
mapper.update: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontTopicMapper.updateFrontTopic */ UPDATE TOPIC SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , GROUP_SEQ = #{groupSeq} /**/ , CATEGORY_SEQ = #{categorySeq} /**/ , TITLE = #{title} /**/ , STATUS = #{status} /**/ , GOOGLE_EVENT_ID = #{googleEventId} /**/ WHERE TOPIC_SEQ = #{topicSeq}

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontTopicMapper.deleteFrontTopic */ UPDATE TOPIC SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , USE_YN = FALSE WHERE TOPIC_SEQ = #{topicSeq}
